name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Located at 6963 GA-85, Riverdale, GA 30274, Cash America Pawn can be reached at +1 770-996-3603. Visit or call to learn more.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the largest international pawn shop chain globally. Founded on the model of providing financial services to cash and credit-constrained consumers, the company has grown to operate more than 3,300 retail pawn locations spanning 29 U.S. states, Washington D.C., the United Kingdom, and Latin American countries including Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador. The company employs approximately 22,000 people and is listed on both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index, indicating its scale as a publicly traded enterprise.

FirstCash's core service is non-recourse pawn lending, where customers pledge personal property as collateral to receive immediate cash loans. The company buys and sells a broad inventory including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. Beyond traditional pawn loans, FirstCash offers gold and precious metal buying at competitive rates, layaway services (with 10% down), and retail sales. Additionally, through its wholly owned subsidiary AFF, the company provides lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through a network of over 15,000 merchant partner locations, diversifying beyond traditional pawn operations.

FirstCash distinguishes itself through its massive scale, geographic reach spanning international markets, and technology infrastructure. Unlike smaller independent pawn shops, FirstCash offers standardized underwriting, consistent store experiences across locations, and an integrated point-of-sale system. The company's size allows for competitive pricing on gold purchases and broader inventory selection. Their store locator tool and online presence provide accessibility advantages. The inclusion in major stock indices reflects institutional credibility.

However, as a pawn lender, FirstCash loans come with inherent limitations. Pawn loans require collateral, may carry high effective interest rates despite being non-recourse, and borrowers risk losing their pledged items. The company targets financially constrained populations, which raises questions about whether pawn lending truly improves financial stability or primarily serves as a high-cost emergency funding mechanism. While transparent about their model, FirstCash is fundamentally a commercial enterprise prioritizing shareholder returns over consumer financial health improvement.
pros: Largest international pawn chain with 3,300+ locations, ensuring accessibility and consistent service standards
Non-recourse pawn loans mean borrowers cannot be pursued for deficiency if collateral doesn't cover the loan
Immediate cash funding on the spot with no credit checks required
Competitive gold and precious metals buying at current market rates
Wide range of accepted collateral items—jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, appliances, sporting goods
Layaway service available as alternative to pawn loans (10% down, affordable payments)
Publicly traded company (S&P 400, Russell 2000) providing financial transparency and regulatory oversight
cons: Pawn loans effectively charge high interest rates relative to traditional lending despite non-recourse structure; borrowers forfeit pledged items if unable to repay
Targets financially constrained consumers who may have limited alternatives, raising fair lending concerns
Does not report payment history to credit bureaus, so pawn loans do not build credit scores
Limited to short-term emergency funding rather than longer-term financial stability solutions
Redemption terms may be stringent; borrowers risk permanent loss of sentimental or valuable personal property
best_for: Consumers needing immediate emergency cash ($100-$5,000+) within hours without credit checks
Individuals with valuable jewelry, electronics, or collectibles they're willing to temporarily pledge
People seeking to buy discounted merchandise or second-hand goods from inventory
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for borrowers facing immediate cash emergencies who have valuable personal property to pledge as collateral and cannot access traditional credit. The primary caveat is that pawn lending is fundamentally a collateral-based, high-cost loan product designed for short-term cash access, not credit-building or financial improvement—borrowers risk losing their pledged items and should exhaust lower-cost alternatives first.
services: Non-recourse pawn loans secured by personal property collateral
Gold, silver, and precious metals buying at cash rates
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Layaway purchase plans with 10% down payment
Store locator tool to find nearest FirstCash location
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions (through AFF subsidiary)
Buy/sell inventory across multiple merchandise categories
